---
name: PM idea
about: Capture a hypothesis for product-manager validation
title: "[pm-idea]: "
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Hypothesis
What opportunity do we believe exists?

## Problem Statement
What user or business problem is present?

## Evidence Summary
Signals supporting this idea (support tickets, usage trends, incidents, etc.)

## Expected Impact
Expected customer and business impact if solved.

## Confidence
Low / Medium / High

## Source Links
Reference links to evidence.

## Notes
Additional context for PM validation.
